name: xhsc
tagline: Reliable MCU and Power Solutions for Industrial and Automotive Applications
description: XHSC (XiaoHua Semiconductor) is a leading Chinese semiconductor company specializing in high-performance MCUs, power management ICs, and motor control solutions for industrial automation, automotive electronics, and consumer applications.
longDescription: XHSC Semiconductor, established in 2008 and headquartered in Shenzhen, China, is a premier fabless semiconductor company focused on microcontroller units (MCUs), power management integrated circuits (PMICs), and motor control solutions. With over 15 years of experience in semiconductor design, XHSC has developed a comprehensive portfolio of ARM Cortex-M based MCUs, high-efficiency power converters, and intelligent motor drivers. The company serves diverse markets including industrial automation, automotive electronics, home appliances, and IoT devices. XHSC products are known for their high reliability, cost-effectiveness, and excellent technical support, making them a preferred choice for designers seeking robust solutions for demanding applications.

coreProducts.name: MCU
coreProducts.description: ARM Cortex-M based microcontrollers with rich peripherals and high performance for embedded applications

coreProducts.name: Power Management
coreProducts.description: High-efficiency DC-DC converters, LDO regulators, and battery management solutions

coreProducts.name: Motor Control
coreProducts.description: Intelligent motor drivers and control solutions for BLDC, PMSM, and stepper motors

coreProducts.name: Interface ICs
coreProducts.description: RS-485, CAN, LIN transceivers and isolation devices for industrial communication

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: PLCs, motor drives, industrial control systems, and factory automation equipment

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Body control modules, motor control, battery management, and sensor interfaces

industries.name: Home Appliances
industries.description: Motor control for washing machines, refrigerators, air conditioners, and kitchen appliances

industries.name: IoT and Smart Devices
industries.description: Low-power MCUs and connectivity solutions for IoT endpoints and smart home devices

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for automotive ICs

seoTitle: XHSC Distributor - MCU, Power Management & Motor Control ICs
seoDescription: LiTong is an authorized distributor of XHSC Semiconductor. We supply ARM Cortex-M MCUs, power management ICs, motor control solutions, and interface devices for industrial and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of XHSC products?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of XHSC Semiconductor. We have established a strong partnership with XHSC to provide customers with genuine products, technical support, and reliable supply chain services. As an authorized distributor, we can offer competitive pricing, fast delivery, and comprehensive application engineering support for all XHSC product lines including MCUs, power management ICs, and motor control solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales team for XHSC product inquiries, samples, and technical documentation.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of XHSC MCUs compared to other brands?
faqs.answer: XHSC MCUs offer several competitive advantages: 1) Cost-effectiveness - XHSC provides high-performance ARM Cortex-M MCUs at competitive prices, making them ideal for cost-sensitive applications. 2) Rich peripherals - XHSC MCUs integrate comprehensive peripherals including multiple UART, SPI, I2C, ADC, PWM, and advanced timers. 3) Industrial-grade reliability - Products are designed and tested for harsh industrial environments with wide temperature ranges. 4) Strong local support - XHSC provides excellent technical support with fast response times. 5) Automotive qualification - Many XHSC MCUs are AEC-Q100 qualified for automotive applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Evaluate XHSC MCUs for your next embedded design project. Contact our FAE team for product recommendations.

faqs.question: What industries does XHSC primarily serve?
faqs.answer: XHSC primarily serves four key industries: Industrial Automation - providing MCUs and motor control solutions for PLCs, motor drives, and industrial control systems. Automotive Electronics - offering AEC-Q100 qualified MCUs, power management ICs, and motor drivers for body control, HVAC, and battery management systems. Home Appliances - supplying motor control solutions for washing machines, refrigerators, air conditioners, and kitchen appliances. IoT and Smart Devices - providing low-power MCUs and connectivity solutions for smart home devices, wearables, and wireless sensors.
faqs.decisionGuide: Identify your application requirements and consult with LiTong FAE team for optimal XHSC product selection.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for XHSC products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for XHSC products including: Application engineering assistance - our FAE team can help with product selection, schematic review, and design optimization. Reference designs - we provide complete reference designs including schematics, PCB layouts, and software examples. Development tools - we support various development boards and debugging tools for XHSC MCUs. Documentation - datasheets, application notes, user manuals, and software libraries are readily available. Sample programs - we provide sample code and drivers to accelerate your development. On-site support - for large projects, we can provide on-site technical support and training.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong technical support team for any XHSC product-related questions or design assistance.

faqs.question: How can I request samples and pricing for XHSC products?
faqs.answer: Requesting samples and pricing for XHSC products is easy through LiTong. For samples, you can submit a sample request through our website or contact your local sales representative. Sample availability depends on the specific part number, and we typically ship samples within 3-5 business days. For pricing, please contact our sales team with your requirements including part numbers, estimated annual usage, and target delivery schedule. We offer competitive pricing based on volume and can provide flexible payment terms for qualified customers. For large volume requirements, we can also discuss long-term supply agreements.
faqs.decisionGuide: Submit your sample request or pricing inquiry through LiTong website or contact our sales team directly.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for XHSC products?
faqs.answer: Lead times for XHSC products vary depending on the product family and order quantity. For standard MCUs and power management ICs, typical lead times are 8-12 weeks. For high-volume orders or specialized products, lead times may be longer. LiTong maintains inventory for popular XHSC parts to support quick-turn requirements and can often ship from stock within 1-2 business days. We recommend contacting our sales team for specific lead time information and to discuss your supply chain requirements. For critical projects, we can also discuss buffer stock arrangements to ensure continuous supply.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales team for current lead times and inventory availability for your specific XHSC requirements.

faqs.question: Are XHSC products suitable for automotive applications?
faqs.answer: Yes, many XHSC products are specifically designed for automotive applications and are AEC-Q100 qualified. XHSC offers a range of automotive-grade MCUs with extended temperature ranges (-40°C to +125°C or +150°C), enhanced EMC performance, and comprehensive diagnostic features required for automotive applications. Their motor control solutions are widely used in automotive HVAC systems, electric power steering, and cooling fan applications. XHSC power management ICs are also used in battery management systems and body control modules. All automotive products undergo rigorous testing and qualification to meet automotive reliability standards.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive applications, specify AEC-Q100 qualified XHSC parts and consult with our automotive FAE team for design recommendations.
